name: evenhub-app-ui
description: Even Hub mobile app design system with official color, typography, layout, component, and pixel-icon guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Design Even Hub mobile UI with official guidance
interface.longDescription: Design, implement, and review Even Realities G2 companion-app interfaces with the official color tokens, typography, layout rules, component patterns, and 191 bundled pixel icons.
defaultPrompt: Design an Even Hub app screen using the official UI system.
Review this G2 companion-app UI for design-system compliance.
